﻿2026-07-06T02:11:55.5597796Z ##[group]Run if gh release view "$TAG" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
if gh release view "$TAG" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  gh release edit "$TAG" --title "$TAG" --latest --draft=false
  gh release upload "$TAG" dist/* --clobber
else
  gh release create "$TAG" --title "$TAG" --generate-notes --latest --verify-tag dist/*
fi
shell: /usr/bin/bash -e {0}
env:
  GH_TOKEN: ***
  TAG: v0.7.0
failed to run git: fatal: not a git repository (or any of the parent directories): .git

Process completed with exit code 1.
data.title: Release failure in GitHub Actions
